description: This file contains utility functions for managing documentation paths, including generating versioned documentation URLs, validating their existence, and constructing filesystem paths related to documentation assets. It also imports Node.js modules and a project-specific configuration module.

methods.name: getVersionedDocsPath
methods.description: Generates a versioned documentation URL based on the provided docs path and current configuration.

methods.name: validateVersionedDocsPaths
methods.description: Checks that all generated versioned documentation paths exist on the filesystem, throwing an error if any are missing.

methods.name: getDocsRelativePath
methods.description: Returns the filesystem path to a documentation resource relative to the documentation directory.

methods.name: getDocsStaticFsPath
methods.description: Returns the filesystem path to the static assets directory within the documentation folder.

methods.name: getDocsPublicFsPath
methods.description: Returns the filesystem path to the public assets directory within the documentation folder.

methods.name: getDocsFsPath
methods.description: Returns the absolute filesystem path to the documentation directory based on the current working directory.
